query:
SELECT u.id, u.name, u.financial_enabled,
       fr.id as resp_id, fr.name as resp_name,
       fru.starts_at, fru.ends_at,
       fru2.user_id as linked_user_id,
       us.username as linked_username
FROM units u
LEFT JOIN financial_responsible_units fru ON fru.unit_id = u.id AND fru.ends_at IS NULL
LEFT JOIN financial_responsibles fr ON fr.id = fru.financial_responsible_id
LEFT JOIN financial_responsible_users fru2 ON fru2.financial_responsible_id = fr.id
LEFT JOIN users us ON us.id = fru2.user_id
ORDER BY u.id;
